description: CompositionBrown knitted sweater with yellow stripes, made of 50% Merino wool and 50% acrylic, has a ribbed v-neckline, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on left chest and a ribbed hemlineFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumbleDry flatFold and stack to maintain shapeThe embroidered brand detailing on the left chest adds sophisticated styling to this knitted sweater from arrow, while the blended fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with shirts or t-shirts, jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
